en-us.title: Clear Skies
en-us.description: The storm was still rumbling when Kuraokami took flight, emerging from the shattered trunk of the Nilam. The Tumult hurricane was raging then. But when he rose high into the sky, his roar alone was enough to scatter the clouds gathered over the Storhvit.
en-us.html:
• Lore

    11 months ago4 minutes

    Clear Skies

    The storm was still rumbling when Kuraokami took flight, emerging from the shattered trunk of the Nilam. The Tumult hurricane was raging then. But when he rose high into the sky, his roar alone was enough to scatter the clouds gathered over the Storhvit.

fr-fr.title: Des Ciels Dégagés
fr-fr.description: L'orage grondait encore lorsque Kuraokami a pris son envol, émergeant du tronc brisé du Nilam. L'ouragan de Tumulte faisait alors rage. Mais quand il a pris position haut dans le ciel, son hurlement à lui seul a eu pour effet de chasser les nuages massés au-dessus du Storhvit.
fr-fr.html:
• Lore

    il y a 11 mois4 minutes

    Des Ciels Dégagés

    L'orage grondait encore lorsque Kuraokami a pris son envol, émergeant du tronc brisé du Nilam. L'ouragan de Tumulte faisait alors rage. Mais quand il a pris position haut dans le ciel, son hurlement à lui seul a eu pour effet de chasser les nuages massés au-dessus du Storhvit.
